description: Letter written by Nissim b. Ḥalfon on behalf of Mardūkh b. Ṣalaḥ Tāhartī (Gil) and sent from Alexandria to Abu Isḥāq Barhūn b. Ṣalaḥ Tāhartī in Fustat. The letter contains details about goods bought by Mardūkh for Barhun, and describes fighting, probably taking place in Sicily. Dated ca. 1057 (Gil's dating). (Information from Gil, Kingdom, and from Ben-Sasson, Sicily)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאלכסנדריה. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
